theme: Limited Q1 2027 production slots open today

linkedin.text:
We're opening our Q1 2027 production calendar today — and it won't stay open long.

Here's why early matters more than most teams assume. The best venues for January–March book 9–12 months out. So do the charter slots, the keynote talent, the room blocks at peak-season destinations. By the time a brief lands in November, the best options are already gone, and you're designing around what's left instead of what you wanted.

We protect a deliberately small number of Q1 slots so every event gets a senior team that owns it end to end — not a calendar stretched thin. From business to pleasure.

If a Q1 2027 kickoff, conference or incentive is on your horizon, now is the moment to claim a slot. DM us or book a call.

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #EventPlanning #B2BEvents

image_prompt: A wall-mounted annual planning calendar in a bright studio, a hand placing a marker on an early-year date, soft morning light through a window, a sense of forward planning and quiet urgency. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
